heading: Mount Pleasant National Scenic Area; purposes
label: 545 Mount Pleasant National Scenic Area; purposes
notes: Amendments1996— substituted “Mount Pleasant National Scenic Area” for “George Washington National Forest Mount Pleasant Scenic Area” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 104–127

Short Title, , , as amended by , , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–314, § 1108 Stat. 1703Pub. L. 104–127, title IX, § 915110 Stat. 1187Aug. 26, 1994Apr. 4, 1996“This Act [enacting sections 545 and 545a of this title] may be cited as the ‘Mount Pleasant National Scenic Area Act’.”
amendments: Amendments1996— substituted “Mount Pleasant National Scenic Area” for “George Washington National Forest Mount Pleasant Scenic Area” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 104–127

Short Title, , , as amended by , , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–314, § 1108 Stat. 1703Pub. L. 104–127, title IX, § 915110 Stat. 1187Aug. 26, 1994Apr. 4, 1996“This Act [enacting sections 545 and 545a of this title] may be cited as the ‘Mount Pleasant National Scenic Area Act’.”

children.text: ensure appropriate protection and preservation of the scenic quality, water quality, natural characteristics, and water resources;
protect and manage vegetation to provide wildlife and fish habitat, consistent with paragraph (1);
provide areas that may develop characteristics of old-growth forests; and
provide a variety of recreation opportunities that are not inconsistent with the preceding purposes.
